visa_types.name: Transit Visa
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > are > en > Table:Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 96.80 per application in addition to the visa fees and must be paid in cash or card (all applicable taxes included).
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure that you have all the supporting documents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure that you have all the supporting documents.

## Visa Fees

[aut > are > en > Table:Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 96.80 per application in addition to the visa fees and must be paid in cash or card (all applicable taxes included).
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

## Short stay visas (Schengen)
Please click here for the Transit Visa checklist 
Please click here for a sample of the NOC letter
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/aut/travel-insurance)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit their Application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 

                                                                        The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organisation).
- Use a white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait style photo (no posing) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.

                                                                        Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Visa Application Form

## Short stay visas (Schengen)
Please click here for the Tourist Visa checklist 
For housemaids, labor contract copy (having completed at least 1year with the same sponsor), declaration form signed by the sponsor, copy of residence visa, passport and tickets of all
                                                                        members travelling are also required. 
(please note: housemaids can only travel if the children of the sponsor are travelling) 
Click here for the Declaration form for Housemaids 
Please click here for a sample of the NOC letter
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/aut/travel-insurance)
